title: Various things for BACAP
description: Adds some things for Blaze and Caves advancement pack.
body:
This datapack allows you to create loot chests(which are necessary for some advancements in Blaze and Caves advancement pack). For crafting you need to use items and blocks that you can get from vanilla mechanics or from skyblock datapacks. (Village and some other chests created for little challenge and have no connection to their loot table. Check gallery to see crafts.)

 Datapack also adds some ways of getting vanilla items (you can get them from a trader, but it just makes it quicker)

 This datapack is created for skyblock with Blaze and caves. You can download datapack for skyblock, "Sky Void Additions" and Blaze and caves datapack in version page.

 Credits:

• Cavinator1 for creating original BACAP 

• BPR02 for creating datapacks for skyblock
